title: schnella angulosa var. meridionalis
intro: Schnella angulosa var. meridionalis, also known as the Southern Schnella, is a plant species within the Schnella genus, native to parts of South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems, due to its rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids. Schnella angulosa var. meridionalis can be prepared as an infusion or tea, which is often used in folk medicine to support overall health and well-being.
